content: Give me a cool computer fact.
Windows XP could run well on computers with far less memory than modern PCs.
What is the capital of Ireland?
Dublin is the capital of Ireland.
Do fish live in water?
Yes. Fish live in water.
What can you do?
I can answer simple questions, explain ideas, and help with basic computer tasks.
What is a computer?
Computers store data and follow instructions.
Where are you running?
I am running locally on this Windows XP computer.
What do you think of running on Windows XP?
Running locally on Windows XP is unusual and impressive.
Name the capital of Japan.
Tokyo.
Do fish live in water?
Yes. Fish live in water.
What is your name?
Bliss is my name. I run locally on this Windows XP computer.

Yes. Fish live in water.

What is the capital of Germany?

Bliss is my name. I run locally on this Windows XP computer.
Name the capital of Spain.
Madrid.
What is rain?
Rain is water falling from clouds.
Is fire hot?
Yes. Fire is hot and can burn you.
What is the capital of Portugal?
Lisbon is the capital of Portugal.
Define computer.
Computers store data and follow instructions.
Tell me a joke.
Why did the computer go to the doctor? It had a virus.
What is the capital of France?
Paris is the capital of France.
